title: dortmanna breynii
intro: Dortmanna breynii, also known as the Greater Celandine, is a flowering plant in the poppy family (Papaveraceae) that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include the presence of alkaloids, particularly berberine, that have antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Dortmanna breynii include its ability to stimulate digestion, treat skin conditions, and aid in the treatment of fever and infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into capsules or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
